name: Tee Box Spanish Fork
address: 928 E 1950 N Suite 106, Spanish Fork, UT 84660
about: Tee Box Spanish Fork is an indoor virtual golf simulator venue specializing in player development through technology and coaching. The facility utilizes TrackMan launch monitor technology for precise swing and ball flight data, offering a professional-grade training environment for golfers of all levels. Located in Spanish Fork, UT, it provides a comprehensive golf improvement program that includes detailed swing analysis, athletic development, club fitting, and community events, operating 24 hours to accommodate flexible practice schedules.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade TrackMan technology for precise swing and ball data analysis
Comprehensive golf improvement programs including fitness and nutrition coaching
24-hour access allowing flexible practice schedules independent of daylight or seasons
Community-focused environment with leagues, events, and group activities
Personalized Box Pro assessments and coaching for targeted game improvement

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; BYOB not specified
No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual radar and camera systems with Optically Enhanced Radar Tracking (OERT)

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals and professional club fittings are available at the facility. The venue also offers club repair services if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, and there's no specific policy stated regarding bringing outside food or beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue states that 30 minutes at Tee Box is comparable to 90 minutes on the course, suggesting efficient play times, though specific 18-hole duration isn't detailed.

faq.question: Is Tee Box kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tee Box is dedicated to creating an inclusive experience for young golfers with patient coaches who work with kids in youth programs to build skills and confidence.
